features.notes: Standard capacity is 4.8 Ah. High-Density option achieves 5.0 Ah as required. Note: High-Density reduces cycle life by approximately 10-15% and cannot be combined with Extended Cycle Life option.

CRITICAL GAP: Customer requires 3C continuous discharge, but BC-NMC-2170 maximum configurable rate is 2.5C per feature catalog. Configured at maximum available (2.5C). Customer must confirm acceptability or consider alternative product BC-NMC-2170-HP which offers 5.0C but has NMC 622 chemistry (instead of requested NMC 811) and only 4.0 Ah capacity.
Customer requirements fall within standard operating temperature range. No extended temperature option required.

features.requested_value: CE, IEC 62619, IEC 62660, UN 38.3, EU Battery Regulation compliance, UL 2580 (desired)
features.configured_value: EU Standard + IEC 62660 Add-on + UL Option
features.notes: EU Standard package (CE, IEC 62619, UN 38.3) included as standard. IEC 62660 automotive testing added (4 weeks additional lead time). UL certification available - note: UL 1642 is the cell-level standard available; UL 2580 is for battery systems. UL adds 4-6 weeks lead time. Customer to confirm if UL 1642 satisfies their UL 2580 requirement or if system-level certification is needed.

CONSTRAINT CONFLICT: Extended Cycle Life (+25% = 1,250 cycles) would meet the 1,200 cycle requirement, but Extended Cycle Life cannot be combined with High-Density capacity (F-001), which is required to meet the 5.0 Ah capacity requirement. With High-Density selected, the effective cycle life is further reduced by 10-15%, yielding approximately 850-900 cycles. Customer must choose: (A) Accept ~850-900 cycles with 5.0 Ah capacity, (B) Accept standard capacity (4.8 Ah) with Extended Cycle Life (1,250 cycles), or (C) Consider alternative product.
Matched sets recommended for EV application to ensure consistent pack performance. Adds 2-3 days to production.
Standard electrolyte formulation selected. No extended temperature or high-voltage requirements indicated.

features.requested_value: Dual branding (Velora Mobility + EuroBatt), QR code required, Italian language
features.surcharge: +EUR 0.03/unit (dual branding) + EUR 800 setup fee + EUR 0.02/unit (QR code)
features.notes: Dual branding with Velora Mobility and EuroBatt logos. Customer must supply artwork in vector format (AI/EPS/SVG). QR code will link to digital product passport. Italian-language safety warnings included as per regulatory requirement. Minimum order 5,000 units - customer volume of 50,000 units qualifies.
Mandatory for EV and light means of transport applications. Digital product passport per EU 2023/1542 requirements. QR code on cell links to passport data.

features.requested_value: CID, PTC, no thermal runaway propagation
features.notes: Current Interrupt Device (CID) and Positive Temperature Coefficient (PTC) are standard features on BC-NMC-2170. Thermal runaway propagation prevention is a pack-level design consideration - cell-level thermal stability is within specification.
BC-NMC-2170 typical internal resistance is within customer's 25 mohm maximum requirement.
BC-NMC-2170 typical weight of 68g is within customer's 70g maximum requirement.

mandatory_additions.reason: EU Battery Regulation 2023/1542 requires digital product passport for EV and industrial batteries
Italian-language safety warnings required per D.Lgs. 188/2008 and customer obligation
Producer identification for Italian EPR compliance (Centro di Coordinamento Nazionale Pile e Accumulatori)

infeasible_features.reason: High-Density capacity required for 5.0 Ah reduces cycle life and prevents Extended Cycle Life option

feasibility.recommendation:
Two critical gaps exist that require customer decision:

1. DISCHARGE RATE: Maximum configurable is 2.5C vs. required 3C. Options:
   (a) Accept 2.5C if application can accommodate
   (b) Switch to BC-NMC-2170-HP (5.0C capable) but accept NMC 622 chemistry and 4.0 Ah capacity
   (c) Consider BC-NMC-POUCH-50 which offers 3.0C with reinforced tabs

2. CYCLE LIFE vs. CAPACITY TRADE-OFF: Cannot achieve both 5.0 Ah and 1,200 cycles due to feature conflict. Options:
   (a) Priority: Capacity - Accept 5.0 Ah with ~850-900 cycles
   (b) Priority: Cycle Life - Accept 4.8 Ah standard capacity with 1,250 cycles (Enhanced option)
   (c) Re-evaluate pack design to work with 4.0 Ah cells from BC-NMC-2170-HP

Recommend customer review meeting to determine priorities before finalizing quote.

certifications_included.standard: Secondary lithium cells for industrial applications
Transport of dangerous goods - lithium batteries
EV battery cell performance, reliability, and safety testing

certifications_included.notes: Customer requested UL 2580 which is pack/system level. UL 1642 is cell level. Customer to confirm requirement.

requirements.notes: Safety warnings and handling instructions in Italian on cell wrap and packaging
EuroBatt producer registration number included. Customer (Velora Mobility) must also register as producer/importer.
Digital product passport accessible via QR code on each cell

customer_obligations_noted: Register as producer with CDCNPA (Centro di Coordinamento Nazionale Pile e Accumulatori)
Join EPR consortium for collection/recycling financing (estimated EUR 0.03-0.08/unit)
Submit annual MUD environmental compliance report
Appoint fiscal representative if Velora Mobility is non-Italian (appears to be Italian S.r.l.)

packaging_config.cell_packaging: Matched sets - cells sorted by capacity and impedance (+/-1%)
packaging_config.traceability: QR/DataMatrix code on each cell linking to digital product passport
packaging_config.artwork_requirements: Customer to supply Velora Mobility logo in vector format (AI/EPS/SVG)

configuration_notes.note: Discharge rate gap: Customer requires 3C, maximum available is 2.5C. This is a fundamental mismatch that cannot be resolved with current product without accepting performance reduction or changing products.
Cycle life and capacity conflict: Cannot achieve both 5.0 Ah capacity and 1,200 cycle life due to feature catalog constraint (F-001 conflicts with F-005). Customer must prioritize one requirement.
With High-Density capacity selected, estimated cycle life drops to 850-900 cycles (vs. 1,200 required), a 25-29% shortfall.
UL certification clarification needed: Customer requested UL 2580 (pack/system level) but EuroBatt offers UL 1642 (cell level). Customer should confirm if cell-level certification is sufficient.
Alternative product BC-NMC-2170-HP could meet discharge rate (5.0C) but uses NMC 622 chemistry instead of requested NMC 811, and has only 4.0 Ah capacity vs. 5.0 Ah required.
Alternative product BC-NMC-POUCH-50 could meet 3.0C discharge requirement with reinforced tab welding, but would require pack redesign for pouch form factor.

conditions_for_proceeding: Customer accepts adjusted discharge rate of 2.5C instead of 3C, OR confirms alternative product
Customer accepts cycle life trade-off (either reduced cycles with 5.0 Ah, or reduced capacity with extended cycles)
Customer provides vector artwork for dual branding
Customer confirms UL certification level requirement (cell vs. system)
